content_of_post_to_comment: Whenever someone tells you that putting yourself first is selfish, remember this.. no one can pour from an empty cup. You don’t have to exhaust yourself to prove your worth. Your mind deserves peace, your body deserves rest, and your soul deserves the space to breathe without guilt. Learn to say no to what drains you and yes to what brings light back into your eyes.
comment: One subtle trap is turning self-care into another form of performance. Sometimes the hardest boundary isn't saying no to others, but resisting the urge to justify every moment of rest as somehow productive.
